data.title: 6P Color appoints Bob Scaglione as CEO to lead platform expansion for next-gen Full Color Range systems in Waco.
data.description: The appointment of Bob Scaglione as the CEO of 6P Color in Waco, Texas, underscores a strategic move in the company's growth trajectory. Known for their innovative Full Color Range color management systems, 6P Color is positioning itself for expansion under Scaglione's leadership. This decision marks a pivotal moment for the company as they aim to advance their platform and solidify their position as an industry leader.
HIGH ROLLER TECHNOLOGIES SHARES JUMP NEARLY FIVE-FOLD PREMARKET AFTER DEAL TO ENTER PREDICTION MARKETS

data.title: Vista AI raises $29.5M in Series B funding as health systems support automated MRI scanning. Cedars-Sinai and Intermountain Health are contributors.
data.description: Today, Vista AI, Inc. announced a significant partnership with major hospitals, such as Cedars-Sinai and Intermountain Health, alongside investors like Khosla Ventures. This collaboration aims to enhance AI-driven scanning technology for anatomies. Based in Palo Alto, California, Vista AI specializes in automated MRI scanning software for medical facilities. This innovative move will expand the reach of advanced medical imaging solutions to a wider audience. This development signifies the growing interest and investment in leveraging artificial intelligence for healthcare advancements.

data.title: NEXA Lending names Todd Bitter as National Director of Sales, emphasizing support and growth for loan officers.
data.description: On January 14th, 2026 in Phoenix, NEXA Lending, the largest mortgage brokerage in the nation, revealed the selection of Todd Bitter as National leader, showcasing a strong dedication to empowering loan officers. This move highlights a pledge to enhance performance through increased responsibility, education, and support within the industry.

data.title: VoiceRun launches $5.5M seed round-backed full-stack Voice AI platform for enterprises.
data.description: VoiceRun, a platform for Voice AI based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, revealed today that they have secured a $5.5 million seed round investment. The funding was led by Flybridge Capital Partners. This code-first platform is known for its flexible deployment options and extensive tooling, along with having forward-deployed engineers.

data.title: Chainlink (LINK) up 4%, Bitwise Chainlink ETF launches on NYSE Arca with zero fees for first 3 months. Senate bill grants LINK commodity status.
data.description: Chainlink (CRYPTO: LINK) has shown a 4% increase in the last 24 hours. There are two recent developments that may further boost its value. Firstly, the launch of Bitwise's spot Chainlink ETF on NYSE Arca with the ticker CLNK. The ETF will have zero fees for the first three months, covering assets up to $500 million, and then a 0.34% management fee. The fund debuted with $2.5 million in seed capital, equivalent to 100,000 shares priced at $25 each, with custody of LINK holdings by Coinbase Custody and cash custody by BNY Mellon. Secondly, a Senate Banking Committee draft bill could grant LINK the same commodity status as Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC). No specific timeline has been provided for LINK staking. Trading of the ETF is expected to commence this week.

data.title: Westlake Royal Building Products™ to reveal new products at 2026 International Roofing Expo in Las Vegas on Jan 20-22.
data.description: Westlake Royal Building Products™, a subsidiary of Westlake Company (NYSE: WLK), is set to showcase its innovative roofing solutions at the 2026 International Roofing Expo in Las Vegas from January 20 to 22, 2026. The event will feature a range of products from their popular brands including Newpoint® Concrete Roof Tile, DaVinci® Roofscapes, US Tile® Clay Roofing Products, Unified Steel® Stone Coated Roofing, and Westlake Royal™ Roofing Components. The company will also conduct installation demonstrations.

data.title: Forum Investment Group launched a new Real Estate Exchange strategy to help investors reinvest 1031 exchange proceeds, offering a transition from active property ownership to a passive, professionally managed real estate structure.
data.description: Forum Investment Group, a private real estate investment management firm based in Denver, has unveiled a new Real Estate Exchange strategy. This initiative offers qualified investors a tax-deferred opportunity to reinvest proceeds from 1031 exchanges. The strategy aims to assist investors in moving from active property ownership to a passive, professionally managed real estate model. Forum's Real Estate Exchange strategy provides an alternative to direct property ownership. By implementing this solution, investors can navigate the transition effectively and benefit from a more structured real estate investment approach.

data.title: Behringer acquires Addison II, a light industrial property in Addison, Texas from Pillar Commercial. CEO Michael D. Cohen expresses alignment with their light industrial strategy.
data.description: Behringer recently disclosed the acquisition of Addison II, a light industrial property in Addison, Texas from a Pillar Commercial affiliate based in Allen, Texas. The property is strategically situated in a thriving infill DFW submarket, catering to various specialized tenants. Michael D. Cohen, the CEO and President of the Dallas-based family office, expressed enthusiasm about the acquisition, highlighting Addison II as a valuable addition that complements their light industrial investment strategy. This acquisition further enriches Behringer's real estate equity portfolio.

data.title: AmTrust Title appoints Andi Stroud as Sr. VP and Regional Manager - Georgia, with 30+ years of expertise in Title Insurance and Real Estate.
data.description: AmTrust Title Insurance Company, a subsidiary of AmTrust Financial Services, Inc., has appointed Andi Stroud as Senior Vice President and Regional Manager - Georgia. With over 30 years of experience in Title Insurance and Real Estate Services, Stroud will lead operations in Georgia, leveraging her track record of driving growth and operational excellence. This appointment is expected to significantly contribute to the advancement of AmTrust Title's services in the region.
BESSENT: REAFFIRMED S. KOREA’S STRONG ECONOMIC PERFORMANCE

data.title: Silk introduces Silk Protein, a plant-based milk with 13g of complete protein, addressing a gap in the market.
data.description: Silk Protein has entered the market as a new refrigerated plant-based beverage, boasting the highest protein content among its competitors in the protein drink category. This latest offering from Silk, the leading plant-based beverage brand in America, provides consumers with 13g of protein per serving. This launch aims to address a significant gap in the market and offers an alternative to protein powders for those seeking a plant-based protein source.

Bessent: 'On Monday, I met with South Korean Deputy Prime Minister to discuss the critical minerals ministerial meeting and ongoing market developments in Korea, including the recent depreciation of the Korean won which is not in line with Korea’s strong economic fundamentals.
BESSENT SAYS EXCESS VOLATILITY IN THE FX MARKET UNDESIRABLE

data.title: CVS Health Foundation grants ADA $2.6M to expand maternal diabetes program in 2 NYC communities, improving outcomes.
data.description: Expanding upon its successful track record of 18 months, a new initiative aims to implement evidence-based strategies to enhance pregnancy and postpartum results for residents of New York City. The CVS Health Foundation has provided a generous grant of $2.6 million to the American Diabetes Association® (ADA) for this purpose. This initiative is set to make a significant impact in improving overall healthcare outcomes for New Yorkers.

data.title: SENS showcases integrated power solutions at POWERGEN 2026 to eliminate #1 cause of generator failure.
data.description: Stored Energy Systems (SENS), a renowned provider of power solutions for critical infrastructure, located in Longmont, Colorado, is set to present its comprehensive engine-starting systems on Jan. 14, 2026. These systems are designed to support mission-critical power needs through a holistic approach at the system level. SENS's cutting-edge solutions will be highlighted to demonstrate their efficacy in ensuring uninterrupted power supply for essential operations.

data.title: Sabre partners with BizTrip AI to enhance corporate travel with AI assistants; Sabre invests in startup.
data.description: In an innovative move, Sabre and Biztrip AI have joined forces to integrate their AI technologies, aimed at revolutionizing the travel booking and management sector. This collaboration will introduce Biztrip's advanced AI assistants to Travel Management Companies (TMCs), suppliers, and enterprises, offering a cutting-edge solution to streamline operations. As part of this partnership, Sabre has made a minority investment in the startup. The companies are based in SOUTHLAKE, Texas, and SAN FRANCISCO. This development was unveiled on January 14, 2026.

data.title: Accertify appoints Greg Dukat as CEO and expands executive team for growth phase.
data.description: Accertify, based in Itasca, Illinois, has recently named Greg Dukat as the new CEO. In addition, the company has made significant additions to its leadership team.

data.title: Insight and Stripe team up to modernize commerce for enterprises, enhancing financial infrastructure and checkout conversion with AI.
data.description: Insight Enterprises (NASDAQ: NSIT) has revealed a new global partnership with Stripe aimed at assisting businesses in updating outdated financial systems and enhancing checkout conversion rates through AI-driven commerce. By combining Stripe’s programmable financial services platform with Insight’s Solutions Integrator expertise, the collaboration seeks to expedite the process for large organizations to introduce innovative digital revenue streams and expand internationally. This initiative aims to transform legacy financial infrastructure and drive growth in the digital commerce landscape.
